label: FAQ Accordion
summary: Accessible FAQ section using native <details>/<summary> elements (so the open/close toggle works even without JS) and a tiny client effect that closes other items when one opens (singleOpen mode). No external icon dependency — uses a plain '+'/'−' glyph. Generic React component that takes a typed array of questions and answers; the codegen LLM is expected to write copy that matches the brief's domain rather than reuse the example data verbatim.
